## Claim to verify

Quote the README, report, or artifact claim that needs stronger evidence.

## Missing evidence

Which proof is missing?

- [ ] labeled fields
- [ ] text evidence
- [ ] numeric evidence
- [ ] table evidence
- [ ] page-level provenance
- [ ] bbox or confidence
- [ ] recovery execution
- [ ] stability/load data
- [ ] API contract behavior

## Suggested challenge case

Describe a realistic document, failure mode, or edge case that should be added.
